summary: iter172 P0 KYC overhaul fully validated end-to-end. Backend 7/7 PASS (test_kyc_iter172.py): (1) CNI without verso → 400 'verso requis'; (2) CNI with recto+verso+selfie → 200 status=pending ai_risk_score=high (synthetic JPEGs as expected); (3) DB row complete with id_back_photo_url + 3 preview_*_url + ai_risk_score + ai_alerts + ai_payload; (4) /api/upload/files/{name} serves full at 1024x704 (≤1024w) and preview at 480x330 (≤480w) — compression confirmed; (5) Passport submit (no verso) → 200 pending; (6) admin/pending payload includes all new fields, charlie_passport row has id_back_photo_url=None; (7) AI never auto-approves — submit always pending. Frontend ADMIN: KYC (4) tab visible, 4 review buttons, RiskBadge data-testid='kyc-ai-score-{high|unknown}' both rendered ('high' on new submissions, 'unknown' on legacy Djounti/Ngueuko), modal opens with 3-col grid Recto/Verso/Selfie, data-testid='kyc-id-photo' / 'kyc-id-back-photo' / 'kyc-selfie' all present. For Djounti (drivers_license, legacy with no id_back_photo_url) the verso column correctly renders 'Image indisponible' fallback DIV — testid present, no broken img. 'IA:' badge + 'Décision finale = humaine. L'IA ne fait que pré-trier.' disclaimer rendered. Image click → fullscreen zoom overlay (data-testid='kyc-zoom-overlay') opens with FULL-RES src (https://.../api/upload/files/kyc_id_46eba857f62a4627.jpg — no 'preview_' prefix ✓). Backdrop click closes overlay (data-testid='kyc-zoom-close' button also present). Approve/Reject buttons + reject reason input present.

ui_bugs.issue: Legacy KYC rows have non-null id_photo_url pointing at files no longer on disk (404 on /api/upload/files/{name}). ImgThumb only renders 'Image indisponible' fallback when url is null/empty — for non-null URLs that 404 the browser shows the default broken-image alt. Recommend adding onError={()=>setBroken(true)} to swap to the same fallback when the GET fails. Not blocking — only legacy/seed data affected; new iter172 submissions render correctly.

action_items: (LOW) ImgThumb in AdminPage.js KycTab: handle 404 of id_photo_url/id_back_photo_url/selfie_url → swap to 'Image indisponible' fallback via onError, otherwise legacy rows show a broken-image icon next to working selfie/recto thumbs.
critical_code_review_comments: kyc.py /submit: dynamic verso check (lines 145-185) correctly enforces id_back required only for national_id/drivers_license, accepts passport with only recto+selfie. Good.
kyc.py _compress_to_jpeg + _save_kyc_image: pillow LANCZOS resize to ≤1024 wide @ q78 + a separate ≤480 preview. Verified at runtime: full=1024x704, preview=480x330. Solid.
kyc.py /admin/pending: json.loads with try/except guard around ai_alerts/ai_payload (handles both jsonb-deserialised dict/list AND legacy str rows). Good defensive code.

kyc_ai_validator.analyze_kyc: Gemini 2.5-Flash multimodal call wrapped with 12s timeout + try/except → never raises, falls back to local heuristics-only result. Local heuristics use Laplacian variance for blur + dimensions + file size — flagged synthetic test images as 'high' with 9 alerts (correct behaviour, no false low-risk).
AdminPage.js KycTab RiskBadge maps {low,medium,high} → coloured pill with data-testid kyc-ai-score-{score} and falls back to 'unknown' for legacy rows with NULL ai_risk_score. Good.

AdminPage.js zoomUrl uses the FULL url (id_photo_url/id_back_photo_url/selfie_url), not the preview_*_url — confirmed live: zoom src = /api/upload/files/kyc_id_*.jpg (no 'preview_' prefix). Lines 671-680 use previewUrl||url for the thumb only. Correct.
AdminPage.js zoom overlay onClick → setZoomUrl(null), inner img has e.stopPropagation, kyc-zoom-close button as redundant exit. Backdrop click closes correctly (verified live).

WalletPage.js KycSubmissionModal isDualSide = id_type ∈ {national_id, drivers_license}. Renders only kyc-id-photo for passport, kyc-id-photo + kyc-id-back-photo for CNI/permis. Helper hints match spec ('main gauche' for selfie, 'nom, numéro, photo et date d'expiration' for recto, 'verso doit aussi être net' for verso). All data-testid in place.
test_credentials: Admin admin@japap.com/JapapAdmin2024!, Bob bob@japap.com/Test1234!, Charlie charlie_iter141@japap.com/Charlie2026! with captcha bypass JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026/0.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 2 fresh KYC pending submissions via test_kyc_iter172._make_test_jpeg helpers: Bob (national_id, recto+verso+selfie) and Charlie (passport, recto+selfie only). Both flagged ai_risk_score='high' with alerts (correct — Gemini detects synthetic images). Plus 2 pre-existing legacy rows (Djounti drivers_license, Ngueuko passport) without id_back_photo_url — these correctly render the 'Image indisponible' fallback in admin verso column.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter172 KYC overhaul ships green: backend test_kyc_iter172.py 7/7 PASS, admin frontend KYC tab fully functional (3-col grid, fullscreen zoom on full-res, AI risk badges, disclaimer, fallback for missing verso). Wallet user-side KYC modal dynamic verso toggle was code-reviewed (WalletPage.js:891 isDualSide guard) and is consistent with backend behaviour validated by pytest [1]+[6]; not exercised live this iter due to captcha math interception in browser flow but identical FormData payload is what the backend tests submit. One LOW-priority residual: ImgThumb does not handle img 404 (only null-URL fallback), so legacy rows with stale URLs show broken-image icon — not a regression of iter172 work, but easy enhancement. Login_attempts may need clearing if captcha bypass is rate-limited.
rca of the issue: n/a — feature ships as designed. Only minor cosmetic gap on legacy data (broken-image icon when ImgThumb url is non-null but the file 404s). Recommend adding an onError handler on the inside ImgThumb to fall back to the 'Image indisponible' DIV in that case.
